{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Silverfangs
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] has the benefit of meat from the [[Silverfangs]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16">''Ghostwater'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
